en_title: The Last of Us Season 3 Casts Peter Sarsgaard as an Original Character, Unseen in the Games
cn_title: 《最后生还者》第三季引入游戏未出现角色
subtitle: 邪教领袖Amon亮相
opus_summary: 据Deadline报道，Peter Sarsgaard加盟《最后生还者》第三季，饰演塞拉菲特领袖Amon，这一原创角色将对剧情产生重大影响。

paragraphs.en: Peter Sarsgaard (The Batman) is joining the cast of The Last of Us Season 3, according to Deadline . The actor will be playing a brand new character who has not appeared in the games. However, his role reportedly has major implications.
paragraphs.cn: 据Deadline报道，Peter Sarsgaard（《新蝙蝠侠》）将加盟《最后生还者》第三季。这位演员将饰演一个游戏未出现过的全新角色，但据报道，他的角色将对剧情产生重大影响。

paragraphs.en: Sarsgaard will play Amon, the leader of the Seraphites. It's unclear how much screen time Sarsgaard will have, but the Seraphites have a significant role in The Last of Us Part II.
paragraphs.cn: Sarsgaard将饰演塞拉菲特（疤脸帮）的领袖Amon。目前尚不清楚Sarsgaard的戏份有多少，但塞拉菲特在《最后生还者Part II》中占据重要地位。

paragraphs.en: Seraphites are a group of religious extremists, largely known for being extremely lethal and intolerant. In the game, they can be seen torturing people and using more primal weaponry, such as bows. They're expected to have a larger role in Season 3, as Abby's story will take center stage. In The Last of Us Part II, Abby joins forces with two Seraphite kids who have been cast out by the cult – Lev and Yara . Fans have speculated that Season 3 may also shine a brighter light on the cult, potentially giving them a whole storyline that wouldn't have been seen in the game.
paragraphs.cn: 塞拉菲特是一个宗教极端组织，以极度致命和不容异己著称。在游戏中，他们折磨他人，并使用弓等更原始的武器。随着艾比的故事成为主线，他们预计在第三季中会有更多戏份。在《最后生还者Part II》中，艾比与两名被邪教驱逐的塞拉菲特孩子——列夫（Lev）和雅拉（Yara）结盟。粉丝猜测，第三季可能会进一步聚焦这个邪教，或许会赋予他们一条游戏里未曾展现的完整故事线。

paragraphs.en: Sarsgaard is one of many talented actors joining the show this season. The Last of Us Season 3 has also enlisted the help of Patrick Wilson , who is playing Abby's father, Jerry. Although he has minimal screentime in the game, Jerry is one of the most significant characters in The Last of Us story. Jason Ritter is also joining the cast as another new character, a WLF soldier named Hanley.
paragraphs.cn: Sarsgaard是本季加盟该剧的众多实力派演员之一。《最后生还者》第三季还邀得Patrick Wilson饰演艾比的父亲杰瑞（Jerry）。尽管杰瑞在游戏中出场时间极少，但他却是《最后生还者》故事里最重要的角色之一。Jason Ritter也将出演另一全新角色——WLF士兵Hanley。

paragraphs.en: The Last of Us Season 3 is expected to be the show's final season , as it will cover the second half of The Last of Us Part II. As of right now, there are no plans to continue the show past the story that's featured in the games. Perhaps if Naughty Dog finally gets around to making The Last of Us Part III , a fourth season will be on the table, but that is likely many years away from happening.
paragraphs.cn: 《最后生还者》第三季预计将是本剧的最终季，因为它将覆盖《最后生还者Part II》的后半部分故事。目前，没有计划让该剧的剧情超越游戏故事的范畴。也许等顽皮狗（Naughty Dog）终于着手制作《最后生还者Part III》时，第四季才有可能提上日程，但那恐怕是很多年以后的事了。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
